heading: Selection boards; composition of boards
label: 2107 Selection boards; composition of boards
text: A board convened under shall consist of five or more officers on the active duty promotion list who are serving in or above the grade to which the board may recommend officers for promotion. No officer may be a member of two successive boards convened to consider officers of the same grade for promotion.section 2106 of this title
notes: Amendments2018—, substituted “section 2106” for “section 251”.Pub. L. 115–282, § 123(b)(2), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282, § 112(b)section 252 of this title
